title: elaphoglossum gladiifolium
intro: Elaphoglossum gladiifolium, also known as the sword fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum gladiifolium include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Elaphoglossum gladiifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
